Wrestling Program Optimization Model

Stop Guessing.
Start Recruiting
With Data.

WPOM is a data-driven recruiting platform that connects athletes and programs through structured evaluation before any contact occurs.

Programs are making $20–50K roster decisions weekly with no structure. WPOM is the recruiting operating system that changes that — scoring every portal athlete and HS recruit by performance, eligibility, and NIL value so your staff evaluates faster and decides smarter.

The Platform

A compliant pre-contact layer for both sides of recruiting

Programs evaluate on-platform. Athletes signal interest. The connection is data-driven with no direct contact — communication moves to external channels only once there is mutual interest.

For Programs
The evaluation layer your staff needs
  • —Score every portal athlete and HS recruit instantly
  • —TARGET / BUILD / CONDITIONAL decision labels at every weight
  • —NIL valuations benchmarked against national market data
  • —See which athletes have signaled interest in your program
Free during beta  ·  Subscription access launching soon
For Athletes
Get in front of the right programs
  • —Build a WPOM profile from your tournament results
  • —See your score, understand your NIL range, and know where you stand
  • —Signal interest to specific programs — no cold emails, no guesswork
  • —Self-report corrections and updates to keep your profile accurate
Free to build a profile  ·  Visibility tiers launching with program subscriptions

General Manager Mode

"The front-end layer to recruiting —
before the portal, before the phone call."

WPOM is a recruiting intelligence platform built on verified data — the same decision-making front offices use in professional sports. Coaches see scoring for every athlete to allocate NIL efficiently, athletes see exactly where they stand and what they're worth.

Score Everything
Every portal athlete and HS recruit gets a WPOM score — performance, eligibility, NIL value, and trajectory in one number.
Allocate Efficiently
Know exactly what each athlete is worth on the NIL market before you make contact. No guesswork. No overpaying.
Build With a System
TARGET, BUILD, CONDITIONAL — every weight class has a decision. Roster construction becomes a process, not a reaction.
♔

Be Your Own General Manager.

Staff Recommendation

Girls High School Recruiting

Girls HS Board — Coming June 2026

Girls wrestling is the fastest-growing segment in HS — and it deserves the same locked, formula-driven scoring as the boys' board. We're calibrating the girls' anchor athlete, scoring 600+ recruits across all 14 NFHS girls' weight classes, and building the verified-win index from Women's Super 32, Women's NHSCA, and Fargo Women's Junior brackets. Live June 2026.

Same Formula
WPOM-HS formula is gender-neutral. Place finishes, state tiers, NWI bonuses — identical logic, applied to girls' results.
Same Pipeline
Same bracket scraper, same scoring engine, same verification feedback loop. Athletes will sign up and get a real-time score, just like the boys.
14 Weights
NFHS girls weights: 100 · 105 · 110 · 115 · 120 · 125 · 130 · 135 · 140 · 145 · 155 · 170 · 190 · 235.
Women's College
Women's college wrestling is now a sanctioned championship. College portal coverage for women's programs follows in Phase 2.
Get Notified at Launch
Coach or athlete on the girls' side? Create a Coach or Athlete profile now — when the girls' board goes live in June, your account is ready and you'll be notified by email.

Programs Directory

Recruiting Now

Programs active on WPOM, grouped by division. Coaches claim their program page during signup. Tap "Interested" to send your verified WPOM profile and tournament history directly to the coaching staff.

Coaches — Claim Your Program
Run a college, JC, NAIA, or HS program? Create a Coach profile to appear in the directory above. Athletes will be able to express interest, sending you their verified WPOM score, GPA, and contact info.

Early Access

Be first in the room.

WPOM is in active development. Programs and athletes who join now shape the platform — and get access before it scales.

  • Full portal scorecard for your weight classes
  • HS recruiting board with WPOM-HS scores
  • Decision labels — TARGET, BUILD, CONDITIONAL
  • Athlete interest signals when athletes go live
  • NIL valuations benchmarked against national data
Pricing
Coaches: $25/mo with 6 months free at launch. Athletes: $5/mo. Both sides free during beta — early access programs lock in founding rates.
